DEFENDANTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, MAYOR NEWSOM, SHERIFF, SFPD GASCON, SAFRAIL, FIRE/EMS, HEALTH, MH AND SF POLICE'S DEMURRER (TO PLAINTIFF KAREN MCBRIEN'S COMPLAINT).

RULING: Plaintiff filed an opposition this morning (04/26/11). Discussed and the Court sustained the demurrer with 10 (court) days leave to amend. Amended complaint to be filed by 05/10/11. Order signed in open court. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
